name: Minecraft
description: The world-building game — mobs, biomes, crafting, and lore

questions.q: What is the name of the explosive green mob that silently stalks players in Minecraft?

source.notes: Drops gunpowder when killed before it detonates.

questions.q: What geometric shape are almost all Minecraft terrain blocks?

source.notes: The world is made of 1x1x1 meter blocks.

questions.q: What is the name of the unbreakable 'floor' block that forms the boundary of the overworld in survival mode?

source.notes: Found at the bottom of the Overworld and the Nether.

questions.q: What resource do new Minecraft players typically gather first by punching trees?

source.notes: Turned into planks, sticks, and crafting tables.

questions.q: Which valuable blue gem is used to craft some of the most durable tools and armor in Minecraft?

source.notes: Netherite is actually stronger, but diamond is the most iconic material.

questions.q: A full day–night cycle in Minecraft takes how long in real time?

source.notes: 10 min of day, 1.5 min each of dusk and dawn, 7 min of night.

questions.q: Before being called 'Minecraft', what was the game's working title in 2009?

source.notes: Renamed 'Minecraft: Order of the Stone' and then just 'Minecraft'.

questions.q: Which tall, teleporting mob dwells in The End dimension?

source.notes: Stare at one to provoke it; they can teleport.

questions.q: Who is the final boss you fight at the end of the vanilla Minecraft storyline, living in The End?

source.notes: Defeating it unlocks the credits and lets you respawn it using end crystals.

questions.q: Which Nether mob is a large, floating jellyfish-like creature that shoots fireballs?

source.notes: Makes an iconic crying sound; drops ghast tears.

questions.q: Which flying, undead mob appears after several in-game nights of not sleeping?

source.notes: Added in Update Aquatic (1.13). Drops phantom membranes used for mending Elytra.

questions.q: What material is required to craft the highest-tier tools and armor in modern Minecraft?

source.notes: Introduced in the Nether Update (1.16); crafted from ancient debris.

questions.q: What passive animal can be sheared repeatedly to collect wool?

source.notes: Can be dyed 16 different colors.

questions.q: Which item placed on the ground sets your spawn point in Minecraft?

source.notes: Also skips the night in the Overworld.

questions.q: The Nether Portal is constructed from which special block?

source.notes: Requires at least 10 obsidian blocks in a rectangular frame.

questions.q: What do Creepers famously drop when killed by a skeleton's arrow instead of by the player?

source.notes: Only by this method can players obtain music discs.

questions.q: In what year was the full 1.0 version of Minecraft officially released?

source.notes: Released November 18, 2011 at MineCon Las Vegas.

questions.q: Which mob species is famously afraid of cats, making felines a good base defense?

source.notes: Creepers will actively flee from cats within 6 blocks.

questions.q: What is the real name of Minecraft's original creator, better known as 'Notch'?

source.notes: Founded Mojang in 2009; sold to Microsoft in 2014.

questions.q: Microsoft acquired Minecraft developer Mojang in 2014 for approximately how much?

source.notes: Closed in November 2014 for about $2.5 billion.

questions.q: Endermen speak in garbled 'English' — what's the actual trick behind their audio lines?

source.notes: Saying things like 'hi' or 'what's up' reversed and distorted.

questions.q: Which item can save a player from what would otherwise be a fatal blow?

source.notes: Dropped by Evokers in Woodland Mansions and raids.
